summary: Classified the 10 live inventory PRs independently with no shared canonical. Deterministic validation marked #92946 and #93546 as security-sensitive, so those exact PR refs are routed to central security handling. Close/fix/merge paths are disabled by this job, so all remaining outcomes are non-mutating keep or needs_human actions.
